name: Gyoza
description: Pan-fried pork or chicken dumplings, perfectly crisp on the outside and juicy inside.

name: Takoyaki
description: Savory octopus balls drizzled with takoyaki sauce, mayo, and topped with bonito flakes.

name: Tempura
description: Lightly battered and deep-fried shrimp and mixed vegetables.

name: Edamame
description: Steamed young soybeans lightly salted. A perfect healthy starter.

name: Karaage
description: Japanese style bite-sized fried chicken, marinated in soy sauce and ginger.

name: Tonkotsu Ramen
description: Rich pork bone broth ramen with chashu, soft-boiled egg, and wood ear mushrooms.

name: Shoyu / Shio Ramen
description: Clear soy-sauce or salt-based broth ramen, light and flavorful.

name: Miso Ramen
description: Rich miso-flavored broth ramen with sweet corn, butter, and chashu.

name: Tempura Ramen
description: Hearty ramen served with crispy shrimp tempura on the side.

name: Yakisoba
description: Japanese stir-fried noodles with pork and vegetables in a savory sauce.

name: Japanese Chicken Curry
description: Crispy chicken katsu served with rich, mildly sweet Japanese curry over rice.

name: Salmon Steak Set
description: Grilled salmon steak glazed with teriyaki sauce, served with rice and miso soup.

name: Orange Chicken
description: Crispy chicken pieces tossed in a sweet and tangy orange sauce.

name: Katsudon
description: Pork cutlet simmered in a sweet soy dashi broth with egg, served over a bowl of rice.

name: Katsu Sandwich
description: Thick pork cutlet sandwich with shredded cabbage and tonkatsu sauce.

name: Creamy Mushroom Pasta
description: Japanese-style wafu pasta with an umami-rich creamy mushroom sauce.

name: Gyudon
description: Thinly sliced beef and sweet onions simmered in dashi and soy sauce over rice.

name: Kitsune Coffee
description: Signature house blend coffee. Available hot or iced.

name: Matcha Latte
description: Premium Uji matcha blended with creamy milk. A cafe favorite.

name: Hokkaido Milk Tea
description: Rich and creamy roasted milk tea.

name: Soft Drinks
description: Selection of refreshing sodas.
